overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy running through a lush tropical environment. The character traverses from a white sand beach up into dense jungle vegetation along a cliffside path, with overgrown modern ruins visible in the distance. Bright midday sunlight creates dramatic god rays filtering through the canopy.

scene_state.functional_zone: tropical beach transitioning to coastal jungle trail

events.description: character runs from open beach into denser jungle vegetation

agents.ego_description: running from the beach up a slope into the jungle, navigating around palm trees and rocks

entered.detail: tall coconut palm with green fronds leaning over the beach
white sandy beach along the shoreline
calm blue ocean water visible beyond the beach
tall overgrown modern building ruins in the misty distance
bright red flowering shrubs dotting the landscape

segments.scene_description: Beginning on a bright tropical beach with white sand and palm trees, the character runs upward into a jungle path. The ocean is visible to the left with distant ruins on the horizon, while red flowering bushes dot the landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep jungle ascent with exposed roots

events.description: sunlight shifts to dappled god rays filtering through dense canopy

agents.ego_description: climbing a steep jungle path with exposed tree roots and rocks, moving deeper into the forest

entered.detail: massive tropical trees with thick trunks forming dense jungle canopy
volumetric light beams piercing through the tree canopy
moss-covered boulders and rock walls lining the path

segments.scene_description: Moving through a dense jungle ascent with steep terrain covered in exposed roots. Dramatic god rays pierce through the canopy overhead as the beach and ocean become visible only in glimpses through the foliage to the left.

agents.ego_description: traversing a cliffside path with the beach visible below to the left, moving through palm trees and dense undergrowth

entered.detail: steep drop-off overlooking the beach and ocean below

segments.scene_description: Running along a cliffside trail with panoramic views of the beach and ocean to the left. The path winds through palm trees and dense tropical vegetation with overgrown ruins visible in the distant haze.

events.description: game UI displays 'Discovered REBEL WATCHER SITE' notification

agents.ego_description: navigating through thick jungle undergrowth toward ancient ruins, discovering a campfire and rebel site

entered.detail: ancient metal and concrete structures covered in vines and vegetation
rusted metallic beams and platforms from old world construction

segments.scene_description: Moving through the densest part of the jungle with thick ferns and red flowering plants, approaching overgrown modern ruins. The character discovers a campfire and a Rebel Watcher site as indicated by on-screen game notifications.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open tropical beach into the dense, shadowed interior of a jungle cliffside. It begins on white sands among palm trees and red flowering bushes, moving upward as the character leaves the ocean behind to enter a jungle path. As the ascent steepens, the open coastline is replaced by thick foliage and exposed roots, with dramatic god rays piercing through the overhead canopy. The scene then opens onto a winding cliffside trail that offers panoramic views of the distant ruins and sea before diving back into the densest part of the jungle. Finally, the camera pushes through thick ferns and red plants toward overgrown modern ruins, arriving at a campfire and a Rebel Watcher site.
